title: The Other Side of the Flame

outskirts_arrival.text: Beyond The Seam's walls, the cliffs opened into a jagged plateau. The air tasted of static.

outskirts_arrival.speaker: Sable
outskirts_arrival.text: This is the Threshold. Everything past here belongs to BL-07.

outskirts_arrival.speaker: Tobias
outskirts_arrival.text: The Bureau maps end exactly at this ridgeline. Beyond is classified — Level 9 clearance only.

outskirts_arrival.speaker: Arrel
outskirts_arrival.text: You've been past this point before.

outskirts_arrival.speaker: Sable
outskirts_arrival.text: Seven times. Seven people went in. I came out alone.
She said it like reciting a weather report. No emotion. Just fact.

outskirts_arrival.speaker: Elia
outskirts_arrival.text: Sable... what happened to the others?

outskirts_arrival.speaker: Sable
outskirts_arrival.text: BL-07 happened. And you need to understand what that means before we go further.

sable_truth.speaker: Sable
sable_truth.text: Everyone thinks Void Holes are tears in reality. Places where the world forgot itself.

sable_truth.speaker: Sable
sable_truth.text: That's what the Bureau teaches. That's what the textbooks say. It's wrong.

sable_truth.speaker: Tobias
sable_truth.text: I've read every Bureau publication on Void Holes. What do you mean 'wrong'?

sable_truth.speaker: Sable
sable_truth.text: BL-07 isn't a hole. It's a mouth.

sable_truth.speaker: Sable
sable_truth.text: It doesn't just consume memories that wander in. It calls them. It's hungry.

sable_truth.speaker: Sable
sable_truth.text: The six people I lost — they didn't die. They were eaten. Their memories, their names, their faces. All consumed.

sable_truth.speaker: Sable
sable_truth.text: Because I had already lost everything worth eating.
She pulled something from her coat. A shell, spiraling inward, its surface covered in faint luminescent veins.

sable_truth.speaker: Sable
sable_truth.text: This is the only thing I brought back. An Echo Shell. It holds the last words of everyone BL-07 consumed.

sable_truth.speaker: Sable
sable_truth.text: Take it. When you're inside, hold it to your ear. It will remind you who you are.
[Obtained: Echo Shell — Holds the last echoes of the consumed. Protects against involuntary memory loss]

sable_trial.speaker: Sable
sable_trial.text: Before we go further — I need to know you can survive in there.

sable_trial.speaker: Sable
sable_trial.text: Not your combat skill. I've seen you fight. I need to know your mind holds.

sable_trial.speaker: Sable
sable_trial.text: Burn something. Right now. Deliberately. And hold yourself together after.

sable_trial.speaker: Elia
sable_trial.text: That's unnecessary. He doesn't need to prove—

sable_trial.speaker: Sable
sable_trial.text: In BL-07, involuntary burns happen every thirty seconds. If he can't handle a controlled burn out here, he dies in there.

sable_trial.speaker: Tobias
sable_trial.text: She has a point. The Bureau's survival data for BL-07 entries is... not encouraging.

trial_complete.text: The burn passed through him like a wave of heat. For a moment, something important slipped away — then Elia's hand was on his shoulder.
The world steadied. The memory was gone, but Arrel knew who he was. Who they all were.

trial_complete.speaker: Sable
trial_complete.text: Good. You held. Most people don't.

trial_complete.speaker: Tobias
trial_complete.text: Residue retention at approximately 70 percent. Remarkable, given the voluntary nature of the burn.

trial_complete.speaker: Sable
trial_complete.text: One more thing. Inside BL-07, you'll hear voices. Not hallucinations — real voices.

trial_complete.speaker: Sable
trial_complete.text: The memories BL-07 consumed still echo. They'll call your name. They'll sound like people you know.

party_preparation.speaker: Tobias
party_preparation.text: I've been reviewing my records. BL-07's expansion rate has accelerated.

party_preparation.speaker: Tobias
party_preparation.text: Six months ago it was growing at 0.3 meters per day. Now it's 2.1 meters. Something changed.

party_preparation.speaker: Elia
party_preparation.text: Could Arrel's burning be feeding it? High-efficiency combustion nearby—

party_preparation.speaker: Tobias
party_preparation.text: That's exactly what my data suggests. Class Seven efficiency at this proximity... BL-07 is responding to him.

party_preparation.speaker: Sable
party_preparation.text: Which means we're out of time. If we don't seal it now, it reaches The Seam in three weeks.

threshold_atmosphere.text: The Threshold was a dead zone. Not dead like the Belt — lifeless. Dead like something had reached in and taken the concept of 'alive' out of the soil.

threshold_atmosphere.speaker: Tobias
threshold_atmosphere.text: Fascinating. My pen won't write here. The ink refuses to adhere to the page.

threshold_atmosphere.speaker: Elia
threshold_atmosphere.text: That's not the ink. The paper is forgetting how to hold marks.

threshold_atmosphere.speaker: Tobias
threshold_atmosphere.text: ...that is significantly less fascinating and significantly more terrifying.

echo_shell_discovery.text: Arrel held the Echo Shell to his ear. At first, nothing. Then — whispers.
A woman's voice: '—told him not to go past the ridgeline—'
A man's voice: '—can still feel my hands even though I know they're—'
A child's voice: '—mama, I forgot what color blue—'

echo_shell_discovery.speaker: Arrel
echo_shell_discovery.text: There are people in here. Fragments of people. Dozens of them.

echo_shell_discovery.speaker: Sable
echo_shell_discovery.text: Six from my team. The rest from before. The Bureau's first expeditions.

echo_shell_discovery.speaker: Sable
echo_shell_discovery.text: They can't feel pain anymore. They can't feel anything. But they remember that they used to.

outskirts_departure.speaker: Sable
outskirts_departure.text: Past the Threshold, the forest starts. It's not a real forest — it's what's left of one.

outskirts_departure.speaker: Sable
outskirts_departure.text: The trees are memories of trees. They'll try to take yours.

outskirts_departure.speaker: Tobias
outskirts_departure.text: A memory-parasitic ecosystem. The Bureau theorized about this but—

outskirts_departure.speaker: Sable
outskirts_departure.text: Move fast. Don't touch anything. If you feel yourself forgetting, say your name out loud.

outskirts_departure.speaker: Arrel
outskirts_departure.text: And if I've forgotten my name?
They crossed the ridgeline. Behind them, The Seam's colors faded to nothing.
